name: The Despair Uranus
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｔｈｅ ｄｅｓｐａｉｒ ＵＲＡＮＵＳ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ザ・ディスペア・ウラヌス</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: When this card is Tribute Summoned while you control no Spells/Traps: You can activate this effect; your opponent declares either Continuous Spell or Continuous Trap, then you Set 1 card of that type directly from your Deck. This card gains 300 ATK for each face-up Spell/Trap you control. Face-up cards in your Spell & Trap Zone cannot be destroyed by card effects.
mnst_eff: When this card is Tribute Summoned while you control no Spells/Traps: You can activate this effect; your opponent declares either Continuous Spell or Continuous Trap, then you Set 1 card of that type directly from your Deck. This card gains 300 ATK for each face-up Spell/Trap you control. Face-up cards in your Spell & Trap Zone cannot be destroyed by card effects.

sets.set: Dragons of Legend: The Complete Series
